Parameter.Description: BGS000_0: Differences between expected and local model positions
BGS000_0: Differences between measured and expected positions
BGS000_0: number of objects used in global FIT
BGS000_0: Number of clipped values (sigma=3.0) of differences between expected and measured position around -120.0 pixels away from reference position
BGS000_0: Number of clipped values (sigma=3.0) of differences between expected and measured position around -130.0 pixels away from reference position
